output.explanation: Does not follow the dominant pattern of 'al_<module>-<number>' or 'ak_<module>-<number>' (this value has an extra character/segment 'scip' vs others like 'al_scip-*').

Module prefix 'ak' appears only rarely; most 'ak_scip' values in the list align with the same 'ak_scip-inf-*' pattern, and this one has 'scip-card-2' which is not seen among the prevalent 'scip-inf-*' / 'scip-vte-*' patterns.
